Hero.title: Compassionate Healthcare For Your Whole Family
Hero.subtitle: Dr. Ata offers comprehensive, personalized primary care in English. We are dedicated to nurturing and protecting your family's health at every stage of life.

Services.title: Comprehensive Primary Care Services
Services.subtitle: Tailored healthcare solutions for your family. From prenatal guidance to elder care, we are here to support your wellness journey.

annual.title: Annual Checkups
annual.desc: Thorough wellness assessments, physical examinations, and custom health action plans tailored to your age and background.

chronic.title: Chronic Disease
chronic.desc: Proactive management plans for diabetes, hypertension, asthma, and cardiovascular wellness to ensure dynamic daily health.

pediatric.title: Pediatric Care
pediatric.desc: Developmental assessments, newborn checks, vaccinations, and specialized consultations to support your child's healthy growth.

mental.title: Mental Health
mental.desc: Empathetic support, counseling, anxiety/depression management, and structured psychiatric resource connections.

vaccinations.title: Vaccinations
vaccinations.desc: Scheduled immunization programs, annual flu shots, travel vaccine counseling, and safety compliance checks.

preventive.title: Preventive Care
preventive.desc: Early health screenings, cardiovascular risk assessments, lipid profile reviews, and healthy lifestyle consulting.

Bio.title: Dedicated to Excellence in Family Practice
Bio.p1: Dr. Ata is a certified family physician with over 15 years of clinical practice, committed to delivering world-class primary care to patients of all ages and backgrounds.
Bio.p2: Dr. Ata believes in a holistic, patient-centered approach — working collaboratively with each patient to provide preventive health education and personalized medical care in English.

Testimonials.title: What Our Patients Say
Testimonials.subtitle: True stories of healing, support, and trusted companionship from individuals and families in our local community.

t1.quote: Dr. Ata has been our family doctor for over a decade. He is incredibly thorough and patient. His warmth and expertise are unmatched.
t1.author: Sarah & Marc L.

t2.quote: I always feel heard during my appointments. Dr. Ata doesn't just treat symptoms; he gets to the root cause and helps me maintain an active, healthy life. The PrimeCare clinic is stunning and calm.
t2.author: Jean-Claude M.

t3.quote: The booking process is seamless and the team is highly professional. Dr. Ata caught a minor thyroid issue early during my routine checkup. I am incredibly grateful for his proactive care.
t3.author: Elena R.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Find quick answers to common questions about appointments, clinic hours, prescriptions, and administrative workflows.
FAQ.q1: Are you currently accepting new family medicine patients?
FAQ.a1: While our practice is mostly full, we open a limited number of spots for family members of current patients and local community referrals. Please complete the registration form via our online booking portal.
FAQ.q2: What should I bring to my first medical consultation?
FAQ.a2: Please bring a valid provincial health card (OHIP or RAMQ), all active prescription bottles, copies of recent lab reports, and your completed patient registration package.
FAQ.q3: How do I request prescription refills?
FAQ.a3: Have your pharmacy fax a refill request directly to our clinic office. Please allow up to 48 business hours for medical review and signature authorization.
FAQ.q4: What is your clinic's cancellation policy?
FAQ.a4: We require at least 24 hours notice for all cancellations or rescheduling. This allows us to offer the opening to another patient who needs prompt medical attention.

CTA.title: Ready to Prioritize Your Family's Wellness?
CTA.subtitle: Schedule your consultation online in under two minutes via our secure booking portal. We look forward to partnering with you on your healthcare path.

About.title: About Dr. Ata
About.subtitle: A lifelong commitment to medicine, academic excellence, and personalized patient-centered primary care.
About.intro: Dr. Ata believes that a family physician is more than a medical provider; they are a trusted guide, an advocate, and a partner in a family's wellness story.

academic.title: Academic & Clinical Milestones
academic.p1: Dr. Ata completed his medical training at a leading Canadian institution, earning his Medical Doctorate (MD) with distinction. He completed his residency training specializing in Family Medicine, where he was recognized for his exceptional clinical and patient-centered skills.
academic.p2: He holds active certification with the College of Family Physicians of Canada (CCFP) and has devoted his career to community primary care, clinical teaching, and patient-centered medical advocacy.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy of Care
philosophy.p1: Every family has a unique dynamic, and we believe healthcare should match those specific needs. PrimeCare is built on the foundations of mutual respect, thorough preventive investigation, and evidence-based clinical practice.
philosophy.p2: We focus heavily on metabolic balance, nutritional guidance, early cardiovascular screening, and pediatric developmental assessments to help you thrive, rather than just manage chronic illness.

credentials.title: Certifications & Memberships
credentials.c1: College of Family Physicians of Canada (CCFP)
credentials.c2: College of Physicians and Surgeons of Ontario (CPSO)

ServicesPage.title: Our Clinical Services
ServicesPage.subtitle: Comprehensive primary care services tailored for every stage of life. Modern clinical standards combined with warm, compassionate support.

annual.title: Annual Comprehensive Checkups
annual.desc1: Our annual checkups go beyond standard physicals. We conduct in-depth reviews of your cardiovascular, metabolic, and emotional wellness.
annual.desc2: Includes detailed blood chemistry evaluations, blood pressure profiling, cancer screenings (pap tests, mammogram referrals, colon screening), mental health reviews, and custom lifestyle prescriptions.

chronic.title: Chronic Disease & Metabolic Care
chronic.desc1: Living with diabetes, hypertension, or high cholesterol requires collaborative, proactive, and individualized care.
chronic.desc2: We work together to track your glycated hemoglobin (A1c), optimize drug therapies, monitor renal health, and devise dietary protocols that let you retain control over your health.

pediatric.title: Pediatric & Adolescent Medicine
pediatric.desc1: We provide specialized primary care starting from the very first week of life through adolescence, creating a safe space for your child.
pediatric.desc2: Includes newborn checks, weight and height developmental charting, milestone testing, routine childhood vaccinations, and behavioral assessments.

mental.title: Mental Health & Counseling
mental.desc1: Mental health is just as critical as physical health. We support patients dealing with stress, burnout, grief, anxiety, and depression.
mental.desc2: We offer supportive clinical psychotherapy, medication reviews, and coordinate seamlessly with cognitive behavioral therapists and psychiatrists.

vaccinations.title: Immunizations & Travel Medicine
vaccinations.desc1: Immunization is the cornerstone of public health. We keep your family safe with complete vaccination schedules.
vaccinations.desc2: Offering standard provincial immunizations, annual high-potency flu shots, shingles and pneumonia vaccines for seniors, and customized travel medicine consultations.

preventive.title: Early Prevention & Risk Screening
preventive.desc1: Our objective is to intercept disease before it has a chance to progress, utilizing advanced clinical testing panels.
preventive.desc2: Features cardiac stress test coordinate plans, bone density screenings, pulmonary function reviews for smokers, and genetic risk mapping reviews.

Book.title: Book Your Appointment
Book.subtitle: Schedule your visit with Dr. Ata quickly and securely through our online booking portal. Same-day and next-day slots are often available.
Book.portalSubtitle: Click the button below to access our secure scheduling system. You can select your service type, preferred date, and complete your registration online.
Book.portalNote: You will be redirected to our secure third-party booking platform.

instructions.title: How to Book Your Appointment
instructions.step1: Click the booking button to open our secure online scheduling portal.
instructions.step2: Select the service type matching your needs (e.g., Routine Visit, Pediatric Check, Urgent Care).
instructions.step3: Pick an available date and time slot from our real-time clinic calendar.
instructions.step4: Complete your patient details and receive an instant confirmation email.

Contact.title: Get in Touch With Us
Contact.subtitle: We are centrally located with convenient parking and accessibility facilities. Reach out to schedule or ask administrative questions.
